detectors.description:
Reentrancy in wera._transfer(address,address,uint256) (wera.sol#641-765):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (wera.sol#705)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (wera.sol#779-791)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (wera.sol#711)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (wera.sol#799)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (wera.sol#763)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (wera.sol#925)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (wera.sol#905)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (wera.sol#907)
	wera._rOwned (wera.sol#317) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- wera._takeTeam(uint256) (wera.sol#919-927)
	- wera._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (wera.sol#879-915)
	- wera.balanceOf(address) (wera.sol#467-471)
	- wera.constructor() (wera.sol#401-431)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (wera.sol#763)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (wera.sol#933)
	wera._rTotal (wera.sol#329) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- wera._getCurrentSupply() (wera.sol#1075-1085)
	- wera._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (wera.sol#931-937)
	- wera.constructor() (wera.sol#401-431)
	- wera.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (wera.sol#563-585)
